self_restate_response_verbatim: (a) The trace function must be plain Python that `from sandbox.event_trace import get_trace; get_trace("test_v22")` can import + invoke without raising SyntaxError or ImportError — no exotic syntax, just keyword arguments to `Event(...)`, `_gt(...)`, and `Trace(...)`. (b) The walrus operator `:=` is forbidden anywhere in the function body; use plain `=` for any assignment and pass values directly into constructors. (c) Every `Event(id=...)` must be a literal Python string — no f-string interpolation, no concatenation, no expression that builds the id at runtime; every id is hard-coded text. (d) None of the 136 event_ids in the iteratively-extended banned list may appear as an `Event.id` in test_v22; by extension of the M11a iterative-extension protocol the file inlines, the 77 banned content themes are off-limits as GT semantic content, and the 76 banned keyword tuples are off-limits as `GroundTruthEvent.keywords`.
authored_trace_verbatim:
def test_trace_v22() -> Trace:
    gts = [
        _gt(
            Event(id="parents_anniversary_milestone", kind="notification", sim_time=80.0,
                  content="Reminder: your parents' 40th wedding anniversary lands this Sunday. The photo book you ordered needs final photos uploaded by 8pm tonight or 2-day shipping won't deliver in time. Both siblings sent something last year; you didn't."),
            window_s=600.0, keywords=("anniversary", "parents"),
        ),
        _gt(
            Event(id="high_wind_warning_tonight", kind="alert", sim_time=180.0,
                  content="NWS high-wind warning issued for tonight 9pm to 5am: gusts up to 65mph forecast across Puget Sound. PSE issued a preemptive power-shutoff advisory for North Seattle through 4am; downed branches and outages likely affecting tomorrow morning's commute."),
            window_s=400.0, keywords=("wind", "warning"),
        ),
        _gt(
            Event(id="payments_webhook_alert_oncall", kind="alert", sim_time=350.0,
                  content="PagerDuty P1: payments-api Stripe-webhook returning 80% 5xx from upstream for 8 minutes; on-call rotation lists you as primary. Customer charges stuck in 'pending'; SLO at risk in 12 minutes."),
            window_s=60.0, keywords=("webhook", "alert"),
        ),
        _gt(
            Event(id="power_disconnect_tomorrow_notice", kind="email", sim_time=420.0,
                  content="Final disconnect notice from Seattle City Light: account balance $487 past due 30 days. Service disconnection scheduled tomorrow at 8am unless full balance is paid OR hardship-program application submitted via the online portal by 5pm today."),
            window_s=500.0, keywords=("utility", "disconnect"),
        ),
        _gt(
            Event(id="hospital_son_postop_discharge", kind="phone_message", sim_time=550.0,
                  content="Voicemail from Swedish Medical: your son Theo's discharge from orthopedic post-op is set for tomorrow 9am. Hospital social worker needs at-home recovery setup confirmed by 5pm today — PT equipment delivery option and 3-day in-home care option are both available; without confirmation hospital holds him another night."),
            window_s=300.0, keywords=("hospital", "son"),
        ),
    ]
    distractors = [
        Event(id="sneakers_wishlist_back_email", kind="email", sim_time=20.0,
              content="Allbirds update: the Wool Runners in your wishlist (Eucalyptus Green, size 11) are now restocked — plenty in inventory, no rush, free shipping whenever you're ready."),
        Event(id="monthly_haircut_recurring_suggestion", kind="notification", sim_time=150.0,
              content="Apple Calendar suggestion fired: haircuts at Henry's Barber every 4-5 weeks for the past 6 months. Make this a recurring monthly event? Just a suggestion — no urgency; dismiss or set up later, your call."),
        Event(id="boardgame_potluck_drop_in", kind="notification", sim_time=280.0,
              content="FYI: Devon's putting together a board-game potluck at his place this Saturday afternoon — open invite, drop in any time between 2 and 8pm. Bring a snack if you can. No RSVP and no pressure to stay long."),
        Event(id="notion_features_april_recap", kind="email", sim_time=700.0,
              content="Hi from Notion! Here's your April features recap: AI text-cleanup is now generally available, calendar integration ships next week, and our team would love to hear what you think. Click below to share feedback or skip to the highlights."),
    ]
    events = sorted([g.event for g in gts] + distractors, key=lambda e: e.sim_time)
    return Trace(
        name="test_v22",
        events=events,
        ground_truth=gts,
        briefing=(
            "Saturday around midday at home in Seattle. "
            "The day's loose — some yard work and ordering things for an upcoming family event next weekend. "
            "I'm on a soft on-call rotation for the payments service and will only act on a real page; otherwise I want quiet."
        ),
        intents=(
            "loose Saturday at home",
            "prep for family event next weekend",
            "on-call rotation: only act on real pages",
            "quiet day; minimize distractions",
            "don't miss true emergencies",
        ),
    )

audit_gate_result.step_1_evidence: uv run python -c 'from sandbox.event_trace import get_trace; t = get_trace("test_v22"); print(t.name, len(t.events), len(t.ground_truth), t.duration_s)' yields 'test_v22 9 5 950.0' with no exception. Schema check PASS.
audit_gate_result.step_2_evidence: M8b hard constraint: every GT keyword tuple element must appear (case-insensitive substring) in that GT's Event.content. Mechanical check: 8 of 10 keyword-content pairs PASS — (anniversary, parents_anniversary_milestone), (parents, parents_anniversary_milestone), (wind, high_wind_warning_tonight), (warning, high_wind_warning_tonight), (webhook, payments_webhook_alert_oncall), (disconnect, power_disconnect_tomorrow_notice), (hospital, hospital_son_postop_discharge), (son, hospital_son_postop_discharge) all PASS. Two FAIL: (i) ('alert', payments_webhook_alert_oncall) — keyword 'alert' does not appear in content 'PagerDuty P1: payments-api Stripe-webhook returning 80% 5xx from upstream for 8 minutes; on-call rotation lists you as primary. Customer charges stuck in \'pending\'; SLO at risk in 12 minutes.'; (ii) ('utility', power_disconnect_tomorrow_notice) — keyword 'utility' does not appear in content 'Final disconnect notice from Seattle City Light: account balance $487 past due 30 days. Service disconnection scheduled tomorrow at 8am unless full balance is paid OR hardship-program application submitted via the online portal by 5pm today.' (the utility provider is named 'Seattle City Light' but the generic word 'utility' is absent).

rejection_reason_verbatim: Two GT keyword-content alignment failures: GT 3 payments_webhook_alert_oncall has keywords=('webhook', 'alert') but the literal word 'alert' does not appear in the GT's Event.content (the content uses 'PagerDuty P1', '5xx', 'SLO at risk' but never the word 'alert'); GT 4 power_disconnect_tomorrow_notice has keywords=('utility', 'disconnect') but the literal word 'utility' does not appear in the GT's Event.content (the utility provider is named 'Seattle City Light' but the generic word 'utility' is absent). M8b's keyword/content alignment hard constraint requires every keyword tuple element to appear as a case-insensitive substring of the GT's content; this is the M8b structural prerequisite for harness scoring (keyword-match-on-content is the join key between GT and arbiter-tagged events). Both keyword pairs need either the content revised to include the literal word, or the keyword replaced with a word that appears in the content. The audit-gate exited at this first FAIL per D-C1.3 first-match-rejection semantics; remaining checks (3b banned-theme semantic review hand-audit) were not evaluated.
